description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a dark green label and a black top. The label features prominent social media logos, including a large white WhatsApp icon and a blue Facebook icon, along with bold white text. Nutritional information and a barcode are visible on the side, printed in white against the green background. The can has a standard pull tab opening on the top, typical of beverage cans. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible condensation. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, utilizing high-contrast colors and clear iconography.
description: A tall, green aluminum can with social media logos, white text, and a black pull tab top. The label is modern, featuring bold icons and a barcode.
description_view_0: The can's side shows nutritional information and part of the green label with white text.
description_view_1: The front displays a blue Facebook icon, 'From facebook' text, and a barcode beneath.
description_view_2: This view highlights a large white WhatsApp logo and partial text on the green label.
description_view_3: The can's side shows the WhatsApp logo, more nutritional details, and the black top.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold green background with large, high-contrast social media icons in white and blue, accompanied by clean, sans-serif white text. Additional elements include a barcode and nutritional information, all arranged in a modern, minimalistic style.
